title: daemon relay SEALED_DELIVER and SEALED_BROADCAST silently dropped
description: relay.rs lines 391-398 explicitly discard SEALED_DELIVER and SEALED_BROADCAST relay events with a comment 'not implemented in daemon v0'. These event types carry payment-gated sealed-sender messages. Any message sent to this daemon via the sealed-sender path is silently lost with no error to the sender and no delivery to the recipient. Callers have no way to know the message was dropped.
